criteria.description: All Op records written to kitty-ops/ (git-tracked by absence from .gitignore)
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_writer.py::TestKittyOpsStorage::test_events_dir_is_kitty_ops — EVENTS_DIR == 'kitty-ops'; test_index_written_at_kitty_ops_ops_index confirms files land in kitty-ops/. .gitignore unchanged (verified by reviewer in both WP01 and WP02 cycles).

criteria.description: Op completion triggers auto-commit via direct git subprocess (not safe_commit); best-effort — failure logged at WARNING, does not block response
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_executor.py::TestAutoCommitOnCompleteInvocation::test_commit_appears_in_git_log (T-003) confirms commit lands in git log after complete_invocation(). test_commit_failure_does_not_raise confirms OSError is caught, WARNING logged, no exception propagated.

tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_executor.py::TestAutoCommitOnCompleteInvocation::test_commit_appears_in_git_log reads git log and asserts message matches op(...): ... [...] pattern. Reviewer confirmed format in cycle-1 review.

criteria.description: Orphan Ops (started but no completed event) are never auto-committed
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_executor.py::TestAutoCommitOnCompleteInvocation::test_orphan_not_committed (T-005) invokes write_started() only, then asserts the file does not appear in git log.

criteria.description: spec-kitty doctor ops lists all orphan Op files in kitty-ops/
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_doctor_ops.py::TestDoctorOpsCLI::test_orphans_found_exits_1 and test_orphan_listed_in_cli_output confirm the subcommand lists orphans and exits 1. TestListOrphanOps (9 unit tests) covers all edge cases.

criteria.description: InvocationRecord gains optional mission_id (str|None) and wp_id (str|None) fields
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_record.py::TestMissionIdWpIdFields::test_invocation_record_has_mission_id_and_wp_id confirms both fields exist with None defaults. test_mission_id_wp_id_included_when_set confirms fields are preserved when supplied.

criteria.description: mission_id/wp_id are null for standalone invocations; populated when caller explicitly supplies them
criteria.evidence: test_executor.py::TestAutoCommitOnCompleteInvocation::test_mission_id_wp_id_none_for_standalone (T-007) confirms both fields are None when not supplied. test_record.py::test_mission_id_wp_id_excluded_when_none confirms excluded from model_dump(exclude_none=True).

criteria.description: do command writes Op record to kitty-ops/ and commits on completion (zero-persistence gap closed)
criteria.evidence: _commit_op_record() is called from complete_invocation() which is the shared completion path for ask, advise, and do commands. test_executor.py T-003 exercises complete_invocation() and confirms commit is produced. do command uses the same executor.complete_invocation() call path.

tests/specify_cli/invocation/test_writer.py::TestKittyOpsStorage::test_index_written_at_kitty_ops_ops_index asserts index file exists at kitty-ops/ops-index.jsonl and NOT at root invocation-index.jsonl (regression guard).

criteria.description: Loop-lifecycle pairing log stored at kitty-ops/lifecycle.jsonl
